text.title: Internationalization (i18n) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the internationalization methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: extract-strings
step.action: Replace every user-facing string with t('key'). Move text into locales/en.json.

step.name: format-data-via-intl
step.action: Replace toLocaleString/manual formatting with Intl.DateTimeFormat etc.

step.name: rtl-audit
step.action: Replace physical properties with logical equivalents on layout components.

step.name: key-drift-ci
step.action: Add key_drift_check.py to CI; fail on missing keys.

step.name: translator-handoff
step.action: Export to translation platform (Crowdin/Phrase/Lokalise); commit the translation chain.
